c.d: The range of operating systems and devices the app supports, ensuring users can transfer files across their preferred platforms.
The rate at which files are transferred between devices, impacting efficiency, especially for large files.
Measures implemented to protect data during transfer, such as encryption protocols and password protection.
The maximum file size the app allows for transfer, affecting usability for large files.

c.n: User Interface and Ease of Use
c.d: The intuitiveness and simplicity of the app's design, influencing user experience.
The app's ability to connect and work seamlessly with other applications and services.
The pricing structure of the app, including free tiers and premium subscriptions.
The ability to transfer files without an active internet connection, useful in areas with limited connectivity.
The app's capability to transfer files between different operating systems, such as iOS to Android.
Extra functionalities like remote control, screen mirroring, or built-in media players that enhance the app's utility.
